name: Cboe Global Markets, Inc.
description: Cboe Canada, formerly known as the NEO Exchange, is a progressive stock exchange that brings together liquidity, transparency, and efficiency to benefit investors and capital-raisers. As a tier-one Canadian stock exchange, Cboe Canada supports the trading of listed securities, including public companies, Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs), and Canadian Depositary Receipts (CDRs). It is part of the global Cboe Global Markets network, offering a technology-driven marketplace designed to foster investor confidence and market integrity.
